endpoints.name: List customers
endpoints.description: List all commerce customers for the given company and data connection
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: List disputes
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: Get company info
endpoints.description:
Retrieve information about the company, as seen in the commerce platform.

This may include information like addresses, tax registration details and social media or website information.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: List locations
endpoints.description:
Retrieve a list of locations as seen in the commerce platform.

A `location` is a geographic place at which stocks of products may be held, or from where orders were placed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: List orders
endpoints.description: Get a list of orders placed or held on the linked commerce platform
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: List payment methods
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of payment methods, such as card, cash or other online payment methods, as held in the linked commerce platform.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: List payments
endpoints.description: List commerce payments for the given company & data connection.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: List product categories
endpoints.description: Product categories are used to classify a group of products together, either by type (eg "Furniture"), or sometimes by tax profile.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: List products
endpoints.description: The Products data type provides the company's product inventory, and includes the price and quantity of all products, and product variants, available for sale.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: List tax components
endpoints.description: This endpoint returns a lits of tax rates from the commerce platform, including tax rate names and values. This supports the mapping of tax rates from the commerce platform to the accounting platform.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: List transactions
endpoints.description: Details of all financial transactions recorded in the commerce or point of sale system are added to the Transactions data type. For example, payments, service charges, and fees.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.
